docket_entries.description: AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR (BY EVE PETRUCCI, PRESIDENT OF DZINE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DZINE, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DZINE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PELETZ, NAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-27-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SEE SIGNATURE) SERVED JAN-13-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PELETZ, NAN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-27-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DZINE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PELETZ, NAN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,065.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DZINE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PELETZ, NAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-27-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-27-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF DZINE, INC IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY EVE PETRUCCI, PRESIDENT. DEFENDANT NAN PELETZ IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
